title: The Cyclic (990,345,120) Difference-Set Case
micro_paper_assessment: Lane-eligible target, but the current solve artifact remains below the micro-paper bar: the quotient package is sharp and finite, yet it does not close the cyclic case.
family_affinity: Strong affinity with cyclic residual-case elimination by multiplier-orbit and quotient-contraction arguments.
generalization_signal: Moderate; the quotient-profile method should transfer to nearby square-n residual cyclic cases with quotient-friendly multipliers.
candidate_theorem_slice: Any cyclic (990,345,120) difference set has only 2 translated profiles mod 5, 2 translated profiles mod 9, 5 translated orbit-profiles mod 11, 12 fully Fourier-valid orbit contractions mod 99, and 18 fully Fourier-valid orbit contractions mod 55.
next_action: If more solve budget is justified, attack the remaining global odd-part obstruction on mod 495; otherwise preserve this as a structural slice for manager review.
